chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 489 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.2020/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 21-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Atta Muhammad, Taluka Education Officer (Female) Kingri, District Khairpur is present and files a statement along with appointment order and submits that the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed as she has been appointed vide Appointment Order dated 01-09-2022 issued by Respondent No.3 / Director School Education (Primary), Sukkur Region, Sukkur, same is taken on record. Since the purpose of filing this Petition has been achieved, therefore, it is disposed of being infructuous along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
